_instructions.purpose: This is a template for creating new canonical data schemas
howToUse: 1. Copy this file and rename to [data-type]-schema.json
2. Replace all [PLACEHOLDER] values with actual definitions
3. Define columns organized by logical categories
4. Include aliases for known alternate column names from sources

fieldProperties.name: Canonical column name (lowercase snake_case)
fieldProperties.type: string | integer | float | boolean | date | datetime | array | object
fieldProperties.required: true if this field must be present
fieldProperties.validation: Optional validation rules (enum, pattern, min/max, etc.)
fieldProperties.transformation: Optional transformation function name to apply
fieldProperties.aliases: Array of known alternate names from various sources
